case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. INGRID GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, INGRID DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-29-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED DEC-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, INGRID
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, INGRID
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAY-07-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR STIPULATED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, INGRID
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-07-2013 CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT OR FILE DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, INGRID $3,403.68 PRINCIPAL, $137.08 INTEREST, $181.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,721.76, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-10-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
